// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.other;

import static com.consumer.y.OtherLog.logInternal;

// The static import names OtherLog, not the declared InternalLog - same
// method name, wrong owner - so the resolved origin does not match and the
// catch swallows.
class Tier2StaticImportWrongClass {
    void wrongOwnerSwallows() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            logInternal("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
